post.description: Get entropy from the device's RNG.
Get device features object
Get public key associated with a particular BIP-32 node.
Dump device coins table.
Confirm device connectivity, optionally with on-device confirmation.
Load a device with externally-derived key material. (Not recommended.)
Start safe recovery workflow to restore from a recovery sentence.

dry_run.description: perform dry-run recovery workflow (for safe mnemonic validation)

no_enforce_wordlist.description: don't enforce BIP-39 wordlist during the process

post.description: Perform device setup and generate new seed.

no_backup.description: Initialize without ever showing the recovery sentence

display_random.description: Display entropy generated by the device before asking for additional entropy

post.description: Enable or disable certain device configuration values
Change device configuration

post.summary: Change or remove the device's PIN
Change or remove the device's wipe code
Encrypt or decrypt a key/value pair
post.description: Encrypt or decrypt a key and associated block of data, possibly with an on-device verification step

ask_on_decrypt.description: don't decrypt without prompting the user (setting must match for both encryption and decryption)

ask_on_encrypt.description: don't encrypt without prompting the user (setting must match for both encryption and decryption)

decrypt.description: decrypt ciphertext instead of encrypting plaintext

value.description: decoded length must be a multiple of 16 bytes

key.description: a key name, which will be mixed into the encryption key

address_n_list.description: BIP-32 path to the encrypting/decrypting key

post.description: Causes the device to forget any cached PIN or passphrase. (Does not end the API session.)
Updates the device's firmware

parameters.name: skipErase
parameters.description: skip the usual firmware erase operation and the associated warning screen

challenge_visual.description: challenge shown on display (e.g. date+time). (Ignored when signing with SSH or GPG identities.)

types.AddressNList.description: a BIP-32 path, expressed as a list of node indexes

types.hex.secp256k1.Signature.description:
- secp256k1 signature in r/s form
- 64 bytes, lowercase hex

types.numeric.UnsignedInteger.Unsafe.description: Warning: while numeric values >= 2^53 are technically valid JSON, they are often deserialized incorrectly when parsed.

types.eth.HexData.description: 0x-prefixed hexadecimal octet string. (The empty string is `0x`.)

types.eth.Signature.description: a 65-byte secp256k1 signature, in 0x-prefixed r/s/v format

no_backup.description: Device was initialized without displaying recovery sentence.

firmware_hash.description: double sha256 hash of the firmware

passphrase_cached.description: is passphrase already cached in session?

pin_cached.description: is PIN already cached in session?

imported.description: was storage imported from an external source?

bootloader_hash.description: double sha256 hash of the bootloader

types.Coin.description: an entry in the device's Coins table
